key_facts: The Rheonics SRV-X5 is a long insertion probe for inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
It has a maximum pressure rating of 100 bar (1500 psi).
The probe is constructed from 316 material.
The minimum insertion length for the probe is 80 mm (3.15 inches).
Dimensions for various parts of the probe are provided in both millimeters and inches.
The drawing specifies a custom flange/adapter option for the probe.
Rheonics is a company based in Switzerland and USA, specializing in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The document indicates that the product is protected by US and International patents.
